🎧 DJ Mix Matcher

Pick a song from the Songs tab (click the # number) to find compatible tracks for mixing. Matches based on BPM proximity and genre similarity.
← Go to Songs tab and click a song's # to select it for mixing

🎡 DJ Mixing Guide — BPM Rules

Perfect match: ±3 BPM — seamless blend, no pitch adjustment needed
Good match: ±7 BPM — slight pitch bend, smooth transition
Stretch match: ±15 BPM — needs pitch shifting, can work with skill
Double/half time: 2× or ½× BPM — genre-crossing trick (e.g. 140 hip-hop over 70 reggae)
Genre matching helps too — songs in similar genres tend to have compatible energy and instrumentation.
